source.name: TibiaWiki/Fandom Achievements
source.scope: Published achievement IDs, grade, secrecy and point totals; spoiler acquisition text is excluded.

notes: The listed count excludes one undiscovered secret achievement.
The raw maximum achievement ID is not an achievement count because the ID space contains gaps.
The exclusive maximum cannot be derived by simply summing registry points because mutually exclusive achievements must be modelled semantically.
